features: WHITE MARK AND STAIN PROTECTION: The NIVEA MEN Black & White Original Anti-Perspirant Roll On prevents white marks on black clothing and yellow stains on white clothing with its anti-stain technology
72H SWEAT BLOCK: Experience reliable 72-hour protection against sweat and odours, while caring for your skin with this NIVEA deodorant for men
5x ANTI: This men's anti-perspirant is designed to care for both your clothes and skin, providing protection against sweat, odour, stains, residues, and irritation
HOW TO APPLY: Simply roll alcohol-free deodorant on underarms, allow it to dry completely. Do not apply to broken or irritated skin
DERMATOLOGICALLY PROVEN: The anti-perspirant formula is dermatologically tested for skin tolerance and does not contain ethyl alcohol
description: Product Description NIVEA MEN Black & White Original Anti-Perspirant Roll On (50ml) - Protects against sweat, odour, stains, residues, and irritation Introducing the NIVEA MEN Black & White range – your ultimate solution for white mark protection on black clothing and anti-yellow staining on white clothing, thanks to our unique patented anti-stains technology. Enjoy reliable 72-hour anti-perspirant protection that effectively combats sweat and odours while caring for your skin. Our dermatologically proven formulas are kind to your skin and free from ethyl alcohol. NIVEA MEN Black & White provides complete protection against sweat, odours, stains, residues, and irritations, all while being gentle on your skin. Trusted in over 160 countries, NIVEA is one of the world's largest and most beloved skincare brands, boasting over 140 years of expertise. As a market leader in the global skincare industry, our researchers are dedicated to delivering high-quality, dermatologically approved products tailored to suit various skin types and needs. Application information : Simply roll alcohol-free deodorant on underarms, do not apply to broken or irritated skin, allow it to dry completely. Product benefits White mark protection on black clothing and anti-yellow staining on white clothing Reliable 72h anti-perspirant protection that cares for your skin x5 Anti: Odour, Sweat, Stains, Residues, Irritation DERMA 72H ACTIVE PROTECTION Skin tolerance dermatologically proven No ethyl alcohol 1 x 50ml Ingredients Aqua, Aluminum Chlorohydrate, Isoceteth-20, Paraffinum Liquidum, Butylene Glycol, Glyceryl Isostearate, Laureth-7 Citrate, Parfum, Palmitamidopropyltrimonium Chloride, Propylene Glycol, PEG-150 Distearate, Linalool, Limonene, Geraniol. Directions Apply evenly to clean and dry underarms. Allow to dry completely before dressing. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not apply to broken or irritated skin. Discontinue use if irritation occurs. Keep out of reach of children. Manufacturer Contact Information Beiersdorf UK Ltd, 2010 Solihull Parkway, Birmingham Business Park, Birmingham, B37 7YS, UK. See more
